nasb.text: Sisera called together all his chariots, nine hundred iron chariots, and all the people who were with him, from Harosheth-hagoyim to the river Kishon.

esv.text: Sisera called out all his chariots, 900 chariots of iron, and all the men who were with him, from Harosheth-hagoyim to the river Kishon.

cnv.text: 西西拉就召集他所有的車輛，就是九百輛鐵車，和與他在一起的眾人，都從夏羅設歌印出來，到基順河那裡。

ccb.text: 便召集全军和九百辆铁战车离开夏罗设，向基顺河进军。
